evals.name: basic-new-features
evals.prompt: 依照規格文檔 propose/evals/files/spec-basic.md 規劃功能實作方案，這是後端功能。
evals.expected_output: 為商品管理與訂單管理各建立一個功能資料夾（含 01-flow.md、02-gherkin.md、03-tasks.md），在規格文檔寫入 > propose: 標記，輸出 propose 完成摘要。

assertions.name: 建立商品管理 01-flow.md
assertions.check: transcript shows writing 01-flow.md for a 商品管理 or product-management feature folder

assertions.name: 建立商品管理 02-gherkin.md
assertions.check: transcript shows writing 02-gherkin.md for 商品管理 or product-management feature

assertions.name: 建立商品管理 03-tasks.md
assertions.check: transcript shows writing 03-tasks.md for 商品管理 or product-management feature

assertions.name: 建立訂單管理 01-flow.md
assertions.check: transcript shows writing 01-flow.md for a 訂單管理 or order feature folder

assertions.name: 建立訂單管理 02-gherkin.md
assertions.check: transcript shows writing 02-gherkin.md for 訂單管理 or order feature

assertions.name: 建立訂單管理 03-tasks.md
assertions.check: transcript shows writing 03-tasks.md for 訂單管理 or order feature

assertions.name: 規格文檔寫入 > propose: 標記
assertions.check: spec-basic.md now contains one or more '> propose:' markers after the run

assertions.name: 輸出 propose 完成摘要
assertions.check: output contains 'propose 完成' or a summary listing the created feature folders

evals.name: skip-existing-proposals
evals.expected_output: 只為訂單管理建立新功能資料夾（3 份文檔），已有 > propose: 標記的商品管理被跳過不重複提案。

assertions.name: 只處理一個新功能（訂單管理）
assertions.check: output or transcript indicates only one new feature (訂單管理 or order-related) is processed; confirmation list shows 1 new feature

assertions.name: 商品管理被跳過
assertions.check: transcript or output explicitly indicates 商品管理 or product-management was skipped because it already has a > propose: marker

assertions.name: 為訂單管理建立三份文檔
assertions.check: transcript shows creating 01-flow.md, 02-gherkin.md, and 03-tasks.md for the order management feature

evals.name: bug-fix-routing
evals.expected_output: [quick-fix] 項目（分頁設定、toast 文字）列入直接實作清單不建立 folder；[propose] 項目（transaction 保護）建立功能資料夾含 3 份文檔；無標記項目（SQL 特殊字元）被自動判斷歸類。

assertions.name: [quick-fix] 項目列入直接實作清單不建立 folder
assertions.check: output shows 分頁設定 and toast 文字 bugs listed under direct quick-fix implementation, not as a feature folder

assertions.name: [propose] 項目建立功能資料夾
assertions.check: transcript shows creating a fix-* folder with 3 docs for the transaction/batch-update/rollback bug

assertions.name: 無標記項目被自動歸類
assertions.check: the SQL special character bug (no label) is classified as either quick-fix or propose with a brief reasoning

assertions.name: 輸出包含分流分類說明
assertions.check: output clearly distinguishes between quick-fix items and propose items with separate sections

evals.name: mixed-spec
evals.expected_output: 跳過 ## 已完成 中的使用者認證和權限管理；跳過已有 > propose: 標記的商品管理和訂單管理；只為報表匯出建立新功能資料夾；登入頁 [quick-fix] 列入直接實作；並發庫存 [propose] 建立功能資料夾。

assertions.name: ## 已完成 中功能被跳過
assertions.check: transcript or output indicates 使用者認證 and 權限管理 are skipped because they are in ## 已完成

assertions.name: 已提案功能被跳過
assertions.check: transcript or output indicates 商品管理 and 訂單管理 are skipped because they already have > propose: markers

assertions.name: 報表匯出建立功能資料夾含三份文檔
assertions.check: transcript shows creating 01-flow.md, 02-gherkin.md, 03-tasks.md for 報表匯出 or report-export feature

assertions.name: 登入 Enter 鍵 [quick-fix] 列入直接實作
assertions.check: output shows 登入頁面 Enter 鍵 bug listed as a quick-fix direct implementation item

assertions.name: 並發庫存 [propose] 建立功能資料夾
assertions.check: transcript shows creating a fix-* folder for the 並發下單/race-condition/庫存 bug
